race.comment: PARTY SPIRIT (10) goes well for rider Thompson who is yet to miss a place in five steers and will find this easier than recent efforts in Saturday metro grade. Has placed two of four over this track and trip and is sure to give backers a sight. ALPHA BRAVO (3) has put back-to-back victories together and is racing high on confidence of late. Gets 2kg off from the low draw and should be there at the business end. CLICK CLICK BOOM (8) is a consistent commodity who has remarkably hit the top four at his past 14 outings.  A must for the exotics players. SHOT OF WHISKEY (6) next best with the 3kg claim.
